Off Calendar Apr-21-2006 Continued To May-01-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 503

Ntc Of Mo For Order Compelling Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Sanctions.
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael J. Braude, Defendant appeared in Propria persona/Opposing party
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Pacific Bell Directory's Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to The Request For Production of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The Requests for Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $590, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Order Striking Answer Of Defendant Sanford Stevenson For Failure To Comply With Discovery and Other Court Orders is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to comply with discovery obligations would not result in compliance. Defedant Sanford Stevenson's Answer is ordered stricken. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
